chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt:Petition.No.D-630 of 2021. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ Before: Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah, Mr. Justice Shamsuddin Abbasi, 01. For orders on M.A.No.2865/2021 (U/ A). 02. For orders on office objection “A”. 03. For orders on M.A.No.2866/2021 (E/ A). 04. For orders on M.A.No.2867/2021 (S/ A). 05. For hearing of main case. 17.11.2021 M/s. Mukesh Kumar G.Karara & Vinod Kumar G.Jessrani, Advocate (s) for the petitioners. = * = * = * = * = * = It is contended by learned counsel for the petitioners that the petitioners are in possession of the landed property, having been leased to them by Katchi Abadi Authorities, and now the Town Committee Kashmore is claiming rent whereof from the petitioners. The controversy advanced, apparently is indicating dispute with regard to ownership of the landed property in possession of the petitioners and its subsequent lease, if any, in their favour by the Katchi Abadi Authorities and Town Committee Kashmore; same being factual could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with listed applications. The petitioners may approach the Civil Court having jurisdiction, for redressal of their grievance in accordance with law, if so is advised. J U D G E J U D G E
